title: Build An Off Grid, RV Oven From Graphene Ink And A Car Battery
description:
If you want to have a look at those special videos become a member and join by clicking this link https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC4AkVj-qnJxNtKuz3rkq16A/join

Temperature is in degrees centigrade. (200 = 392 fahrenheit). If you want to buy the ink you can get it from here https://secure.workingink.co.uk/product-category/working-ink-ink/
If you ask me - Heating and Cooking are two of the main challenges in going off grid - mostly because there are not a lot of cookers working on DC and at low voltages - so you are forced to use grid of inverters - Changing to low voltage DC is, in my mind, an important issue particularly for cookers -that's why I did this.
